response.overview: Private introduces you to Kama Oxi, a beautiful brunette who needs much more than just conversation, she needs intimacy and passion! The same can also be said for Bonni Gee, Angelique Lapiedra and the stunning Barbie Rous, and together they’ve all come to Private to get the intimacy they need! There’s nothing but good passionate sex on the agenda in Intimacy & Passion Vol. 5, and in the cases of Angelique and Kama, they’ll enjoy their favourite chocolate flavour too! Don’t miss it!
response.title: Intimacy & Passion Vol. 5
